race.comment: JIMMY ANGEL (1) missed narrowly on resumption before a 1L defeat behind a handy type in stronger company most recently. Third-up now and drawn the inside out in trip, he ticks plenty of boxes and makes plenty of appeal. Can get the job done this time. ALL LACED UP (11) comes here on the fresh side after being beaten in a strong form race at Bunbury before the break. She has good early speed and she'll be fitter for two trials coming in. Sure to give a bold sight on debut. CANNOTSTOP (3) was solid on resumption at Kalgoorlie when jumping favourite and he looks ready to go to the next level this time around. Drawn perfectly with that run under his belt and he makes plenty of appeal. VALANNE DAWN (8) bounced back last time out and can't be left out. BEND IT LIKE BECKS (6) is not out of this on debut.
